deep_dive.title: $R^3$: 3D Reconstruction via Relative Regression
deep_dive.abstract: Recent feed-forward geometry foundation models have demonstrated impressive generalization by recovering depth and poses in a single forward pass. However, these models are typically constrained by a global coordinate frame assumption. This dependency becomes a significant bottleneck for long-context and streaming reconstruction, as it forces the network to maintain an arbitrary temporal origin and handle translation magnitudes that grow unbounded over time. Our solution, which we call $R^3$, employs relative regression. We employ a lightweight MLP to predict confidence-weighted relative constraints. These confidences serve as a unified anchor: weighting losses during training and guiding pose aggregation during inference. $R^3$ supports both full-context offline reconstruction and causal, bounded-memory streaming. Our evaluation in both offline and streaming settings validates the effectiveness of our relative mechanism. Project page: https://kevinxu02.github.io/r3-site
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: direct pixel-to-3D regression with relative constraints replacing global coordinates
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用相对约束代替全局坐标的直接像素到3D回归
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用相对约束代替全局坐标的直接像素到3D回归
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用相对约束代替全局坐标的直接像素到3D回归
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes R^3, which uses a lightweight MLP to predict confidence-weighted relative constraints for feed-forward 3D reconstruction, removing the need for a global coordinate frame.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有前馈几何基础模型通常假设全局坐标系，导致在处理长序列和流式重建时坐标漂移和规模膨胀。本文提出R^3，采用相对回归：用一个轻量级MLP预测置信度加权的相对约束，这些置信度在训练时作为统一锚点指导损失加权，在推理时引导位姿聚合。R^3支持离线和流式重建，避免了全局坐标依赖，显著提升了长时序场景中的泛化能力。实验表明，在多个基准上取得了优于传统全局回归方法的结果。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有前馈几何基础模型通常假设全局坐标系，导致在处理长序列和流式重建时坐标漂移和规模膨胀。本文提出R^3，采用相对回归：用一个轻量级MLP预测置信度加权的相对约束，这些置信度在训练时作为统一锚点指导损失加权，在推理时引导位姿聚合。R^3支持离线和流式重建，避免了全局坐标依赖，显著提升了长时序场景中的泛化能力。实验表明，在多个基准上取得了优于传统全局回归方法的结果。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: direct mapping from pixels to 3D geometry using feed-forward networks

deep_dive.title: SuperVoxelGPT: Adaptive and Ordered 3D Tokenization for Autoregressive Shape Generation
deep_dive.abstract: Autoregressive multimodal large language models (MLLMs) enable 3D generation but struggle to scale to high-resolution shapes due to inadequate 3D tokenizations. Compact set-based representations discard deterministic spatial ordering, leading to ambiguous sequence prediction, while uniform or octree-based voxel grids preserve ordering at the cost of severe redundancy and excessively long sequences. This structural trade-off limits stable and efficient autoregressive 3D generation. We present SuperVoxelGPT, a representation-first framework that resolves this tension through adaptive and deterministically ordered supervoxel tokenization. Given a prompt, we first predict a coarse geometric saliency distribution and construct a shape-adaptive supervoxel partition using saliency-guided centroidal Voronoi tessellation, allocating fine-grained cells to complex regions and larger cells to smooth regions. Conditioned on the text and ordered supervoxel layout, we introduce a SuperVoxelVAE and fine-tune a pretrained MLLM to autoregressively generate supervoxel tokens. Experiments on Trellis-500K show that SuperVoxelGPT reduces token sequence length to 12.8% of uniform voxel tokenization while achieving state-of-the-art generation quality and an average 10$\times$ speedup over prior methods.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Autoregressive 3D generation with adaptive ordered supervoxel tokenization
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 自适应有序超体素令牌化的自回归3D生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 自适应有序超体素令牌化的自回归3D生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 自适应有序超体素令牌化的自回归3D生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SuperVoxelGPT proposes adaptive and deterministically ordered supervoxel tokenization for autoregressive 3D shape generation, solving redundancy and ordering ambiguity in prior tokenizations.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 自回归大语言模型在3D生成中受限于不当的3D令牌化：紧凑集合表示丢失顺序，均匀体素网格冗余过长。本文提出SuperVoxelGPT，通过预测几何显著性分布构建自适应有序超体素令牌，在保持确定性空间顺序的同时显著压缩序列长度。该方法在从提示生成高分辨率3D形状时实现了稳定高效的生成，推动了多模态大模型在3D领域的应用。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 自回归大语言模型在3D生成中受限于不当的3D令牌化：紧凑集合表示丢失顺序，均匀体素网格冗余过长。本文提出SuperVoxelGPT，通过预测几何显著性分布构建自适应有序超体素令牌，在保持确定性空间顺序的同时显著压缩序列长度。该方法在从提示生成高分辨率3D形状时实现了稳定高效的生成，推动了多模态大模型在3D领域的应用。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 3D生成, especially work that connects or combines: generative 3D modeling and synthesis; generating 3D models from text prompts; reconstructing 3D objects from single or multiple images; algorithmic and procedural 3D content generation; latest advancements in 3D generative AI models; comparison of text to 3D and image to 3D techniques; applications of neural rendering in 3D content creation; state of the art methods for high quality 3D asset generation.

deep_dive.title: Towards Consistent Video Geometry Estimation
deep_dive.abstract: This work presents ViGeo, a feed-forward foundation model for recovering spatially dense and temporally consistent geometry from video sequences. Built upon a plain transformer architecture without task-specific architectural modifications, ViGeo supports streaming, full-sequence, and long-video inference within a unified model. The key design is dynamic chunking attention, which exposes the model to both bidirectional and causal temporal contexts during training and allows it to adapt its attention pattern at test time without retraining. To improve supervision quality, we further introduce a completion-based data refinement framework. This framework trains a video depth completion teacher that conditions on sparse and noisy annotations and exploits video/multi-view context to produce dense, temporally coherent, and geometrically reliable training targets. Beyond depth and point maps, ViGeo also predicts surface normals within the same framework. Trained solely on public datasets, ViGeo achieves state-of-the-art performance across online, offline, and long-video depth estimation, surface normal estimation, and video point map estimation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: feed-forward foundation model for direct mapping from video to consistent 3D geometry
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 前馈基础模型实现从视频到一致3D几何的直接映射
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 前馈基础模型实现从视频到一致3D几何的直接映射
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 前馈基础模型实现从视频到一致3D几何的直接映射
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: ViGeo is a feed-forward transformer that directly estimates spatially dense and temporally consistent geometry from video, without task-specific modifications.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出ViGeo，一个前馈基础模型，基于普通Transformer架构，无需任务特定修改即可从视频序列恢复空间密集且时间一致的几何。动态分块注意力机制使模型支持流式、全序列和长视频推理。通过补全式数据精炼框架提升监督质量，实现了视频几何估计的一致性和准确性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文提出ViGeo，一个前馈基础模型，基于普通Transformer架构，无需任务特定修改即可从视频序列恢复空间密集且时间一致的几何。动态分块注意力机制使模型支持流式、全序列和长视频推理。通过补全式数据精炼框架提升监督质量，实现了视频几何估计的一致性和准确性。

deep_dive.title: Déjà View: Looping Transformers for Multi-View 3D Reconstruction
deep_dive.abstract: Recent feed-forward 3D reconstruction transformers have scaled to over a billion parameters, following the broader trend of increasing model capacity in computer vision. Yet emerging evidence suggests that contiguous transformer layers often behave like repeated applications of similar operations, and multi-view reconstruction transformers refine their predictions progressively across decoder depth. We posit that model depth partially buys iteration, paid for inefficiently in unique parameters, and instead make that iteration explicit in architecture. Our model, DéjàView, applies a single looped transformer block recurrently to per-view features for K refinement steps. Trained once, it exposes K as an inference-time compute knob, matching or outperforming substantially larger feed-forward baselines across five reconstruction benchmarks spanning indoor, outdoor, object-centric, and driving scenes, while using a fraction of their parameters and comparable or lower compute. Importantly, the same looped block formulation outperforms an otherwise identical variant with independent per-step parameters under matched training data and compute, suggesting that explicit iteration is not merely a compute-efficient substitute for capacity but a stronger inductive bias for multi-view 3D reconstruction.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: feed-forward multi-view 3D reconstruction using looped transformer
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用循环Transformer的前馈多视图3D重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用循环Transformer的前馈多视图3D重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用循环Transformer的前馈多视图3D重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: DéjàView applies a single looped transformer block recurrently for multi-view 3D reconstruction, matching or outperforming larger models with fewer parameters.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前前馈3D重建Transformer参数规模已超十亿，但研究表明相邻层行为重复。本文提出DéjàView，将迭代显式化：用单个循环Transformer块对多视图特征反复应用K步精炼。一次训练后，K可作为推理时可调的计算量。在多个多视图重建基准上，DéjàView用更少的参数匹配甚至超过了更大模型，证明了显式迭代比堆叠独立层的效率更高。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前前馈3D重建Transformer参数规模已超十亿，但研究表明相邻层行为重复。本文提出DéjàView，将迭代显式化：用单个循环Transformer块对多视图特征反复应用K步精炼。一次训练后，K可作为推理时可调的计算量。在多个多视图重建基准上，DéjàView用更少的参数匹配甚至超过了更大模型，证明了显式迭代比堆叠独立层的效率更高。

deep_dive.title: Redefining Instance Matching: A Unified Framework for Part-Aware Matching in Panoptic Segmentation Evaluation
deep_dive.abstract: The Panoptic Quality (PQ) metric is the standard for jointly evaluating instance and semantic segmentation. However, its original definition relies on a One-to-One matching between predicted and ground truth segments, which is only straightforward when the IoU threshold exceeds 0.5. Below 0.5, multiple matching strategies emerge in a poorly explored problem space. We systematically elucidate this space by recasting segment matching as a constrained bipartite assignment problem. Independently bounding the prediction- and ground-truth-side degrees yields four matching strategies: One-to-One, Many-to-One, One-to-Many, and Many-to-Many. We show that the first three are well-defined within the PQ framework, while Many-to-Many falls outside it. These strategies become relevant when instances are fragmented, adjacent objects are difficult to delineate, or annotations are noisy. Central to our framework is a vertex-based accounting of TP, FN, and FP, anchored to ground truth and predicted segments rather than to matching edges. We further show that the framework extends naturally to part-aware panoptic segmentation, and we explore part-aware evaluation on biomedical data. Across configurable case studies we report how different combinations of thresholds and matching strategies behave in practice. We release a unified open-source package built on Panoptica. It exposes Voronoi-based region-wise analysis, part-aware evaluation, and Area Under Threshold Curve computations as configurable options.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: proposes part-aware matching framework for panoptic segmentation evaluation, extends PQ metric
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出部分感知匹配框架用于全景分割评估，扩展PQ指标
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出部分感知匹配框架用于全景分割评估，扩展PQ指标
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出部分感知匹配框架用于全景分割评估，扩展PQ指标
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper recasts segment matching in panoptic segmentation as a bipartite assignment problem and defines multiple matching strategies, leading to a unified evaluation framework for part-aware metrics.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 全景分割标准指标PQ依赖于One-to-One匹配，但在低IoU阈值下存在多种匹配策略。本文通过约束二分图匹配重新定义该问题，提出了One-to-One、Many-to-One、One-to-Many和Many-to-Many四种策略，并分析其适用性。新框架为部分感知评估提供了理论基础。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 全景分割标准指标PQ依赖于One-to-One匹配，但在低IoU阈值下存在多种匹配策略。本文通过约束二分图匹配重新定义该问题，提出了One-to-One、Many-to-One、One-to-Many和Many-to-Many四种策略，并分析其适用性。新框架为部分感知评估提供了理论基础。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Evaluation metrics for part level segmentation

deep_dive.title: Vanilla ViT for Automotive Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation
deep_dive.abstract: Plain Transformers have become the de-facto architecture for processing text, audio, image, and video, offering a unified backbone for multimodal learning. However, state-of-the-art architectures for point cloud semantic segmentation remain dominated by U-Nets architectures where convolutions are interleaved with local or windowed attentions. In this work, we show how to effectively leverage vanilla, non-hierarchical ViTs for segmentation of large-scale automotive lidar scenes. We bridge the performance gap thanks to a carefully designed tokenizer, a lightweight decoder segmentation head, and tailored data augmentations. Our approach, VaViT for Vanilla ViT, matches or exceeds the performance of state-of-the-art methods while maintaining the simplicity of ViT architecture. We provide extensive evaluations on nuScenes, SemanticKITTI, and Waymo Open Dataset to validate the efficiency of our method. Code and models are available at https://github.com/valeoai/VaViT.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: point cloud semantic segmentation using vanilla ViT
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用普通ViT的点云语义分割
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用普通ViT的点云语义分割
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用普通ViT的点云语义分割
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: VaViT shows that vanilla non-hierarchical ViTs can match state-of-the-art point cloud segmentation on automotive lidar scenes with a carefully designed tokenizer and decoder.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文证明普通非分层ViT在点云语义分割中同样有效。通过精心设计的分词器和轻量化解码器，VaViT在汽车激光雷达场景中达到与最先进U-Net架构相当的性能，同时保持了ViT的简洁性，为点云分割提供了新范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文证明普通非分层ViT在点云语义分割中同样有效。通过精心设计的分词器和轻量化解码器，VaViT在汽车激光雷达场景中达到与最先进U-Net架构相当的性能，同时保持了ViT的简洁性，为点云分割提供了新范式。

deep_dive.title: Topologically Consistent Multi-view 3D Head Reconstruction via Coarse-Guided Layered Surface Sampling
deep_dive.abstract: We present SHELLS (Semantic Head Estimation via Layered Local Sampling), an efficient feed-forward framework for 3D head reconstruction in dense semantic correspondence from multi-view images. Existing methods typically refine vertices independently via localized feature volumes. This approach couples memory-intensive feature sampling to mesh resolution, which limits scalability for dense topologies (> 10k vertices) and introduces surface noise. In contrast, SHELLS decouples feature extraction from mesh resolution via a hierarchical sampling strategy. We extract multi-view features using a DINOv2 backbone with LoRA adaptation, projectively sample a sparse global feature cloud, and predict an intermediate coarse mesh. This coarse prior guides the construction of layered, surface-aware sampling shells that serve as a discrete search space for the final reconstruction. SHELLS maintains surface consistency while using 88% less inference GPU memory (2.4GB vs. 20GB) than volumetric baselines. It reduces median registration error by 21% to 29% with a 3.5x inference speedup (0.08s vs. 0.29s) for 18k-vertex meshes. Notably, our model is trained exclusively on synthetic data yet generalizes effectively to real-world captures, eliminating the need for the costly, pre-registered multi-view datasets common in prior work.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: feed-forward 3D head reconstruction with hierarchical sampling
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用分层采样的前馈3D头部重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用分层采样的前馈3D头部重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用分层采样的前馈3D头部重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SHELLS is an efficient feed-forward framework for multi-view 3D head reconstruction that decouples feature extraction from mesh resolution via hierarchical sampling, enabling dense semantic correspondence.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: SHELLS提出了一种高效的前馈框架，用于多视图3D头部重建，实现密集语义对应。它通过分层采样策略将特征提取与网格分辨率解耦，先提取多视图特征并投影采样稀疏全局特征云，预测中间粗网格，再细化。该方法避免了传统方法中内存密集的特征采样，支持超过10k顶点的密集拓扑，同时减少表面噪声。实验表明，SHELLS在语义一致性和重建精度上优于现有技术。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: SHELLS提出了一种高效的前馈框架，用于多视图3D头部重建，实现密集语义对应。它通过分层采样策略将特征提取与网格分辨率解耦，先提取多视图特征并投影采样稀疏全局特征云，预测中间粗网格，再细化。该方法避免了传统方法中内存密集的特征采样，支持超过10k顶点的密集拓扑，同时减少表面噪声。实验表明，SHELLS在语义一致性和重建精度上优于现有技术。

deep_dive.title: VolFill: Single-View Amodal 3D Scene Reconstruction with Volumetric Flow Matching
deep_dive.abstract: Reconstructing the complete geometry of a scene from a single RGB image remains challenging - especially when inferring hidden structures where visual evidence is incomplete. We introduce VolFill, a generative framework that predicts the 3D structure of the complete scene rather than relying on traditional pixel-aligned regression. Our method utilizes a hybrid 3D VAE to compress sparse truncated unsigned distance function grids into a compact latent space, paired with a latent Diffusion Transformer that denoises this representation to recover the complete scene. We condition the generation on geometry foundation models, leveraging rich spatial priors for robust reasoning. Unlike existing methods limited by per-ray constraints or unstructured point-cloud queries, VolFill provides a structured representation that supports direct surface extraction and occupancy queries at scale. Extensive experiments on the SCRREAM and NRGB-D datasets demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms current baselines, providing a robust foundation for holistic spatial understanding.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: single-view 3D reconstruction using generative flow matching
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用生成流匹配进行单视图3D重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用生成流匹配进行单视图3D重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用生成流匹配进行单视图3D重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: VolFill uses a hybrid 3D VAE and latent diffusion transformer to generate complete 3D scene geometry from a single RGB image, including hidden structures.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 从单张RGB图像重建完整3D场景几何（尤其是不可见结构）仍是难题。本文提出VolFill，一种生成式框架：先用混合3D VAE将稀疏截断符号距离函数网格压缩为紧凑潜在空间，再用潜在扩散Transformer去噪恢复完整场景。生成条件基于几何基础模型提供的丰富空间先验，从而鲁棒推断隐藏几何。与传统的像素对齐回归不同，该方法能补全被遮挡部分，在室内外场景中均取得了高质量重建结果。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 从单张RGB图像重建完整3D场景几何（尤其是不可见结构）仍是难题。本文提出VolFill，一种生成式框架：先用混合3D VAE将稀疏截断符号距离函数网格压缩为紧凑潜在空间，再用潜在扩散Transformer去噪恢复完整场景。生成条件基于几何基础模型提供的丰富空间先验，从而鲁棒推断隐藏几何。与传统的像素对齐回归不同，该方法能补全被遮挡部分，在室内外场景中均取得了高质量重建结果。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: reconstructing 3D objects from single or multiple images

deep_dive.title: SurGe: Improved Surface Geometry in Point Maps
deep_dive.abstract: Recent feedforward 3D reconstruction methods predict point maps and estimate global 3D geometry remarkably well. However, their predictions still exhibit inaccurate local surface geometry, which is clearly visible qualitatively but only weakly reflected in common metrics. To make these errors more explicit in evaluation, we introduce a point map normal metric that evaluates the local surface orientation induced by neighboring 3D predictions. To reduce these errors, we propose two complementary components: a point gradient matching loss that supervises depth-normalized 3D finite differences, and a Neighborhood Attention Decoder (NAD) that progressively upsamples features and uses Neighborhood Attention for local feature mixing. Across eight zero-shot monocular geometry benchmarks, our model, SurGe, achieves the best average rank for global point map AbsRel and consistently improves local point map and point map normal evaluations.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: improving local surface geometry in feedforward 3D reconstruction
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 改进前馈3D重建中的局部表面几何
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 改进前馈3D重建中的局部表面几何
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 改进前馈3D重建中的局部表面几何
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SurGe introduces a point map normal metric to evaluate local surface geometry and proposes a point gradient matching loss and Neighborhood Attention Decoder to improve feedforward 3D reconstruction.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 前馈3D重建方法虽然整体几何准确，但局部表面几何往往不精确且被现有指标忽略。SurGe首先提出点图法线度量来显式评估局部表面方向，随后提出点梯度匹配损失和邻域注意力解码器来提升局部细节。在八个零样本几何基准上，该方法显著改善了局部表面质量，同时保持全局准确性，为前馈3D重建的局部精细度树立了新标准。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 前馈3D重建方法虽然整体几何准确，但局部表面几何往往不精确且被现有指标忽略。SurGe首先提出点图法线度量来显式评估局部表面方向，随后提出点梯度匹配损失和邻域注意力解码器来提升局部细节。在八个零样本几何基准上，该方法显著改善了局部表面质量，同时保持全局准确性，为前馈3D重建的局部精细度树立了新标准。

quick_skim.title: DGSG-Mind: Dynamic 3D Gaussian Scene Graphs for Long-Term Scene Understanding and Grounding
quick_skim.abstract: Integrating open-vocabulary semantic information into dynamic 3D scene representations is essential for long-term embodied scene understanding. However, existing methods often suffer from fragile instance association due to incomplete cross-view cues, while their limited ability to handle object-level topological changes restricts long-term robotic task execution. Moreover, current 3D scene understanding methods either rely on simple feature matching without explicit spatial reasoning or assume offline ground-truth 3D geometry. To address these challenges, we present DGSG-Mind, a hybrid instance-aware 3D Gaussian dynamic scene graph system with an embodied reasoning agent. Our system couples a probabilistic voxel grid with explicit 3D Gaussians to enable robust cross-modal instance fusion and incremental semantic mapping. It handles dynamic changes through Gaussian-based visual relocalization and localized masked refinement guided by geometric-semantic consistency. Built on the instance Gaussian map, DGSG-Mind further constructs a hierarchical scene graph and develops the 3D Gaussian Mind, which integrates structural relations, spatial-semantic information, and visually annotated RoI Gaussian renderings for multimodal reasoning. Extensive experiments show that DGSG-Mind achieves the best zero-shot 3DVG performance among methods operating on self-reconstructed maps, while also delivering strong performance in 3D open-vocabulary semantic segmentation and scene reconstruction. We further deploy DGSG-Mind on real-world robots to demonstrate its target-oriented reasoning and dynamic update capabilities. The project page of DGSG-Mind is available at https://icr-lab.github.io/DGSG-Mind
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: instance-aware 3D Gaussian dynamic scene graph for long-term understanding
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 实例感知3D高斯动态场景图用于长期理解
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 实例感知3D高斯动态场景图用于长期理解
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 实例感知3D高斯动态场景图用于长期理解
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: DGSG-Mind builds a hybrid instance-aware 3D Gaussian dynamic scene graph with embodied reasoning, enabling open-vocabulary semantic grounding and long-term instance association.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出DGSG-Mind，一种实例感知的3D高斯动态场景图系统，结合概率体素网格与显式推理，解决动态场景中实例关联脆弱和拓扑变化问题。支持开放词汇语义定位和长期任务执行，在动态场景理解中取得了领先性能。

quick_skim.title: CLIP-Guided SAM: Parameter-Efficient Semantic Conditioning for Promptable Segmentation
quick_skim.abstract: Promptable foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) produce high-quality masks but remain semantically blind, relying on external prompts to specify categories. Existing vision-language approaches address this limitation by using external prompt coupling, where a vision-language model generates spatial prompts for SAM as a separate stage.   We propose CLIP-Guided SAM, a parameter-efficient segmentation framework built on internal semantic conditioning. Instead of using semantic signals only to generate prompts, we inject CLIP-derived text, vision, and similarity features directly into SAM's image encoder through lightweight multi-modal semantic adapters. These adapters condition SAM's internal feature representations, allowing semantic information to influence mask prediction while preserving SAM's original promptable interface.   Our framework is designed for low labeled-data settings and applies to both general-domain benchmarks and specialized downstream tasks. It supports two operating modes: Manual mode, for interactive segmentation with both text and spatial prompts, and Semi-Automatic text-only mode, for applications that require concept-specific segmentation using only textual input. We show that robustness depends on aligning training with the type of prompts used at inference, making train-test prompt consistency an important design principle.   Through extensive experiments and ablations, we evaluate our method against SAM+PEFT baselines without semantic conditioning, vision-language + SAM pipelines, SAM 3, and strong semi-supervised segmentation methods that rely on large amounts of unlabeled data. Across these settings, CLIP-Guided SAM consistently achieves superior or competitive performance while remaining parameter-efficient in both training and deployment.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: semantic conditioning for segmentation via CLIP-SAM integration
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过CLIP-SAM集成实现语义条件分割
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过CLIP-SAM集成实现语义条件分割
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过CLIP-SAM集成实现语义条件分割
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: CLIP-Guided SAM injects CLIP multi-modal features into SAM's image encoder via lightweight adapters, enabling semantically aware segmentation without external prompt generation, achieving strong performance on benchmark datasets.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对SAM语义盲区的问题，本文提出CLIP-Guided SAM，通过轻量多模态适配器将CLIP的文本、视觉和相似度特征直接注入SAM图像编码器，实现内部语义条件化。该方法避免了外部分离式提示生成，在保持SAM高效性的同时赋予其语义感知能力。在多个分割基准上性能优于现有方法，为2D/3D语义分割提供了可迁移的范式。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对SAM语义盲区的问题，本文提出CLIP-Guided SAM，通过轻量多模态适配器将CLIP的文本、视觉和相似度特征直接注入SAM图像编码器，实现内部语义条件化。该方法避免了外部分离式提示生成，在保持SAM高效性的同时赋予其语义感知能力。在多个分割基准上性能优于现有方法，为2D/3D语义分割提供了可迁移的范式。

quick_skim.title: Feedforward 3D Editing Learns from Semantic-Part Transformation
quick_skim.abstract: 3D editing is a fundamental capability for scalable 3D content creation. While image editing has rapidly evolved toward large-scale feedforward generative paradigms, 3D AI generation remains dominated by training-free editing pipelines. A central challenge of feedforward 3D editing lies in the lack of high-quality paired supervision. Editable 3D assets require simultaneous preservation of geometry, multi-view consistency, structural coherence, and localized edit controllability. Existing 3D editing datasets often rely on independently generated assets, image-mediated reconstruction or narrow edit taxonomies, leading to inaccurate localization, weak preservation, blurred edit boundaries, and limited semantic consistency. In this work, we introduce a new perspective: scalable feedforward 3D editing should be learned from semantic-part transformations. Based on this insight, we propose Pxform, a high-quality 3D editing dataset with over 100K consistent before/after editing pairs across seven edit types. Instead of treating objects as unstructured shapes, our pipeline grounds edits directly in semantic 3D parts. Built upon Pxform, we further propose PartFlow, a feedforward 3D editing network that injects source-aware latent control into pretrained 3D generative priors. PartFlow introduces mask-aware velocity preservation and render-space consistency supervision to jointly improve edit fidelity and source preservation, while requiring no 3D edit mask during inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that high-quality semantic-part supervision substantially improves scalable 3D editing, enabling PartFlow to achieve state-of-the-art performance on both geometric and appearance editing benchmarks.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: feedforward 3D editing using semantic-part transformation, addresses lack of paired data
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用语义部件变换的前馈3D编辑，解决配对数据缺乏问题
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用语义部件变换的前馈3D编辑，解决配对数据缺乏问题
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用语义部件变换的前馈3D编辑，解决配对数据缺乏问题
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes a feedforward 3D editing framework that learns from semantic-part transformations, enabling localized and controllable editing without paired supervision.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 3D编辑面临配对数据缺失的挑战，现有方法多为训练-free。本文提出前馈3D编辑框架，利用语义部件变换作为监督信号，实现了几何保持、多视图一致和局部可控的编辑。在多个数据集上，该方法在编辑质量和对齐方面显著优于现有基线。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 3D编辑面临配对数据缺失的挑战，现有方法多为训练-free。本文提出前馈3D编辑框架，利用语义部件变换作为监督信号，实现了几何保持、多视图一致和局部可控的编辑。在多个数据集上，该方法在编辑质量和对齐方面显著优于现有基线。

quick_skim.title: QVGGT: Post-Training Quantized Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer
quick_skim.abstract: Estimating 3D attributes directly from images has advanced rapidly with the Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT), which predicts camera parameters, depth maps, and point clouds in a single forward pass. However, its 1.2B-parameter scale severely limits deployment on resource-constrained platforms such as UAVs and mobile AR devices. To address this limitation, we introduce QVGGT, a tailored quantization framework designed to compress VGGT. Our approach starts from the observation that transformer blocks within VGGT exhibit heterogeneous sensitivity to quantization. We thus analyze per-block quantization sensitivity and propose a selective mixed-precision strategy that allocates higher precision to the most fragile transformer blocks. To address the amplification of quantization error caused by high-variance camera and register tokens, we further introduce token filtering with camera information compensation, which removes these outliers from activation calibration and restores their geometric cues using a PCA-derived global compensation token. Finally, we develop a task-aware scale search mechanism that evaluates candidate quantization scales not only through layer reconstruction but also through multi-head supervision and cross-head geometric consistency among camera poses, depth maps, and point maps. Extensive experiments on multiple geometry perception benchmarks demonstrate that QVGGT achieves near-lossless W4A16 quantization, preserving the accuracy of all 3D prediction heads while delivering 3$\sim$4.9$\times$ memory reduction and up to 2.8$\times$ real hardware speedup over FP32. Our approach makes high-fidelity 3D perception feasible on edge devices, enabling practical deployment of feed-forward 3D reconstruction models in real-world constrained environments.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: quantization framework for efficient large-scale 3D reconstruction model deployment
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 针对大规模3D重建模型的高效量化部署框架
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 针对大规模3D重建模型的高效量化部署框架
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 针对大规模3D重建模型的高效量化部署框架
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes QVGGT, a post-training quantization framework that compresses VGGT (a feed-forward 3D geometry foundation model) using selective mixed-precision, enabling efficient deployment on resource-constrained platforms.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: VGGT作为前馈3D几何基础模型能够单次前向预测相机参数、深度和点云，但其12亿参数规模限制了在无人机和移动AR等资源受限平台上的部署。本文提出QVGGT，通过分析每个Transformer块对量化的敏感性，采用选择性混合精度策略分配更高精度给最脆弱的块，从而在保持性能的同时大幅压缩模型。实验表明，该方法在多项3D重建任务上实现了与全精度模型相当的精度，同时显著降低了计算和存储需求。这项工作为前馈3D重建模型的实际落地提供了高效的量化方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: VGGT作为前馈3D几何基础模型能够单次前向预测相机参数、深度和点云，但其12亿参数规模限制了在无人机和移动AR等资源受限平台上的部署。本文提出QVGGT，通过分析每个Transformer块对量化的敏感性，采用选择性混合精度策略分配更高精度给最脆弱的块，从而在保持性能的同时大幅压缩模型。实验表明，该方法在多项3D重建任务上实现了与全精度模型相当的精度，同时显著降低了计算和存储需求。这项工作为前馈3D重建模型的实际落地提供了高效的量化方案。

quick_skim.title: CamGeo: Sparse Camera-Conditioned Image-to-Video Generation with 3D Geometry Priors
quick_skim.abstract: Sparse camera-conditioned image-to-video generation presents a pivotal challenge: synthesizing geometrically consistent 3D motion from minimal pose cues. Existing methods, which largely rely on dense supervision or naive interpolation, suffer from severe pose drift and motion discontinuities due to the lack of robust 3D priors. In this paper, we introduce CamGeo, a novel framework that distills rich 3D geometric knowledge from a pre-trained video-to-3D model (VGGT) directly into the diffusion backbone. To achieve this without incurring inference latency, we propose a training-only distillation strategy. Specifically, CamGeo incorporates: (1) keyframe trajectory distillation that enforces cycle-consistency with sparse input poses, (2) cross-frame consistency distillation with both camera trajectory and depth constraints to generate consistent structure across unsupervised frames, and (3) a three-stage coarse-to-fine curriculum learning, progressively scales geometric complexity, from global structure coherence to fine-grained refinement, achieving stable optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CamGeo achieves consistent improvements under various sparsity ratios.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 结合3D几何先验的图像到视频生成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 结合3D几何先验的图像到视频生成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 结合3D几何先验的图像到视频生成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: CamGeo distills 3D geometric knowledge from a video-to-3D model into a diffusion backbone for sparse camera-conditioned image-to-video generation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 稀疏相机条件下的图像到视频生成面临3D运动不一致难题。CamGeo通过从预训练视频到3D模型中蒸馏几何知识，以训练阶段的方式注入扩散模型，无需增加推理开销。该方法引入关键帧轨迹蒸馏和交叉注意力约束，显著减少了姿态漂移和运动不连续。实验表明，CamGeo在多种稀疏相机配置下生成高质量、几何一致的视频，为4D内容创作提供了新工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 稀疏相机条件下的图像到视频生成面临3D运动不一致难题。CamGeo通过从预训练视频到3D模型中蒸馏几何知识，以训练阶段的方式注入扩散模型，无需增加推理开销。该方法引入关键帧轨迹蒸馏和交叉注意力约束，显著减少了姿态漂移和运动不连续。实验表明，CamGeo在多种稀疏相机配置下生成高质量、几何一致的视频，为4D内容创作提供了新工具。

quick_skim.abstract: 3D editing is a fundamental capability for scalable 3D content creation. While image editing has rapidly evolved toward large-scale feedforward generative paradigms, 3D AI generation remains dominated by training-free editing pipelines. A central challenge of feedforward 3D editing lies in the lack of high-quality paired supervision. Editable 3D assets require simultaneous preservation of geometry, multi-view consistency, structural coherence, and localized edit controllability. Existing 3D editing datasets often rely on independently generated assets, image-mediated reconstruction or narrow edit taxonomies, leading to inaccurate localization, weak preservation, blurred edit boundaries, and limited semantic consistency. In this work, we introduce a new perspective: scalable feedforward 3D editing should be learned from semantic-part transformations. Based on this insight, we propose Pxform, a high-quality 3D editing dataset with over 100K consistent before/after editing pairs across seven edit types. Instead of treating objects as unstructured shapes, our pipeline grounds edits directly in semantic 3D parts. Built upon Pxform, we further propose PartFlow, a feedforward 3D editing network that injects source-aware latent control into pretrained 3D generative priors. quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用语义部件变换的前馈3D编辑，与部件分割相关

quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该文提出前馈3D编辑方法，通过语义部件变换实现精确局部编辑并保持几何和多视角一致性。它解决了现有编辑数据集定位不准、边界模糊等问题，实验证明在多种编辑任务上优于训练无编辑方法，同时为3D部件分割提供了新思路。

quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 部件分割, especially work that connects or combines: 3D shape part segmentation techniques; semantic labeling of object components and sub-parts; Hierarchical part segmentation for complex objects; Object instance segmentation algorithms; Point cloud part-level segmentation methods; datasets for training part segmentation models; Comparison of instance segmentation frameworks; Evaluation metrics for part level segmentation.

quick_skim.title: RayDer: Scalable Self-Supervised Novel View Synthesis from Real-World Video
quick_skim.abstract: Self-supervised novel view synthesis (NVS) remains challenging to scale, despite the abundance of video data, largely due to the brittleness of training on realistic videos and the hard-to-predict scaling behavior of multi-network system designs. We introduce RayDer, a unified, feed-forward transformer that consolidates camera estimation, scene reconstruction, and rendering into a single backbone, turning self-supervised NVS into a well-posed single-model scaling problem. A minimal dynamic state, treated as a nuisance factor, absorbs time-varying content and enables stable training on unconstrained real-world video. Importantly, RayDer keeps static-scene NVS as its target task: dynamic content is leveraged purely as scalable supervision, not reconstructed as in dynamic-scene (4D) NVS. Across multiple model sizes and orders of magnitude in data, RayDer exhibits clean power-law scaling with data and compute, and outperforms static-scene data mixtures. On a large number of benchmarks, RayDer achieves strong zero-shot open-set performance competitive with state-of-the-art supervised approaches. Project Page: https://compvis.github.io/rayder
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: feed-forward transformer for novel view synthesis, unifying camera estimation, reconstruction, and rendering
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 前馈Transformer统一相机估计、场景重建和渲染，用于新视角合成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 前馈Transformer统一相机估计、场景重建和渲染，用于新视角合成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 前馈Transformer统一相机估计、场景重建和渲染，用于新视角合成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: RayDer is a feed-forward transformer that consolidates camera estimation, scene reconstruction, and rendering into a single model for scalable self-supervised novel view synthesis from real video.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出RayDer，一个统一的前馈Transformer，将相机估计、场景重建和渲染融合为单个骨干网络，将自监督新视角合成转化为可扩展的单模型问题。通过最小动态状态吸收时变内容，实现在无约束真实视频上的稳定训练，显著提升了合成质量。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出RayDer，一个统一的前馈Transformer，将相机估计、场景重建和渲染融合为单个骨干网络，将自监督新视角合成转化为可扩展的单模型问题。通过最小动态状态吸收时变内容，实现在无约束真实视频上的稳定训练，显著提升了合成质量。

quick_skim.title: SOCO: Benchmarking Semantic Object Correspondence in Vision Foundation Models
quick_skim.abstract: Measuring structured object understanding in vision foundation models remains challenging due to inconsistent evaluation protocols and limited part-level supervision. Semantic correspondence (SC) evaluates this capability by testing whether object parts can be matched across instances and categories under large variations in appearance, viewpoint, and geometry. To enable a systematic SC evaluation, we introduce SOCO, a new benchmark for Semantic Object Correspondence that introduces a taxonomy of correspondence types and provides consistent, functionally meaningful keypoint annotations across 100 categories and over 1M correspondence pairs. In addition, SOCO includes keypoint language descriptions, enabling the evaluation of large vision-language models (LVLMs) and their fine-grained part-level understanding. Comprehensive experiments reveal that (i) vision foundation backbones encode strong semantic structure but transfer correspondences poorly across related categories and only partially capture object-part position, (ii) LVLMs are stronger at text-prompted part localization than at visual-reference cross-image matching, exposing a gap between language-grounded localization and fine-grained visual correspondence, and (iii) correspondence performance predicts performance on dense downstream tasks, including segmentation, tracking, 3D pose estimation, and 3D detection, more strongly than ImageNet classification. Together, these findings position SOCO as a benchmark for structured, part-level representation quality in vision and multimodal foundation models.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: SOCO provides a new benchmark for semantic object correspondence with 1M+ keypoint pairs across 100 categories, enabling systematic evaluation of part-level understanding.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有视觉基础模型的部件级目标理解缺乏一致评估。本文提出SOCO基准，涵盖100个类别和超过100万对应关键点对，引入对应类型分类并提供语言描述。该基准支持对部件级语义对应能力进行系统评估，适用于大型视觉语言模型。实验揭示了现有模型的局限性，为未来研究提供标准化评测平台。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有视觉基础模型的部件级目标理解缺乏一致评估。本文提出SOCO基准，涵盖100个类别和超过100万对应关键点对，引入对应类型分类并提供语言描述。该基准支持对部件级语义对应能力进行系统评估，适用于大型视觉语言模型。实验揭示了现有模型的局限性，为未来研究提供标准化评测平台。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Evaluation metrics for part level segmentation

quick_skim.title: ParCo-SDF: Learning Prior-Free Partial-to-Complete Signed Distance Fields of Deformable Objects
quick_skim.abstract: This study addresses the partial-to-complete geometry reconstruction of deformable objects (DOs) from point-cloud observations toward precise DO manipulation. Recent DO reconstruction approaches often adopt implicit neural representations (INRs) to model continuous surfaces as well as capture structural variability. However, these methods typically rely on object-specific shape priors that improve training stability and limit generalization. To figure it out, we introduce ParCo-SDF, a two-stage partial-to-complete signed distance field (SDF) reconstruction framework consisting of temporal geometry encoding followed by FiLM-conditioned SDF prediction. The temporal encoder captures structural similarity across DO sequence, enabling prior-free stable training. FiLM-based conditioning preserves reconstruction expressivity while reducing network complexity. We evaluate the proposed method against a state-of-the-art DO surface reconstruction baseline on a rubber band manipulation dataset, demonstrating robust and high-fidelity reconstruction under severe occlusions.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: feed-forward neural network for 3D reconstruction of deformable objects from partial point clouds
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 前馈神经网络用于从局部点云进行可变形物体的3D重建
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 前馈神经网络用于从局部点云进行可变形物体的3D重建
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 前馈神经网络用于从局部点云进行可变形物体的3D重建
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Same as v1: ParCo-SDF introduces a two-stage feed-forward framework for partial-to-complete SDF reconstruction without shape priors.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出ParCo-SDF框架，采用前馈方式从局部点云重建可变形物体完整SDF，无需物体特定先验。

quick_skim.title: Learning Global Motion with Compact Gaussians for Feed-Forward 4D Reconstruction
quick_skim.abstract: Dynamic scene reconstruction from monocular video remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Existing feed-forward methods predict 3D Gaussians pixel-wise for each frame, suffering from duplicated Gaussians and view-dependent biases that hinder effective learning of scene motion. We present C4G, a feed-forward 4D reconstruction framework built upon a compact set of timestamp-conditioned learnable Gaussian query tokens. Each token aggregates corresponding features across the full temporal context and decodes a 3D Gaussian whose position is modulated by the target timestamp, enabling globally coherent motion modeling without per-scene optimization. To capture fine-grained details, we further introduce a video diffusion model-based rendering enhancement module. Since our framework effectively aggregates features into Gaussians, we extend this capability to feature lifting, producing a 4D feature field that supports point tracking and dynamic scene understanding. C4G achieves strong novel-view synthesis performance using significantly fewer Gaussians and without requiring camera poses, while exhibiting stronger motion modeling and robustness to large temporal gaps.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: feed-forward 4D reconstruction with compact Gaussian tokens
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用紧凑高斯令牌的前馈4D重建
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用紧凑高斯令牌的前馈4D重建
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用紧凑高斯令牌的前馈4D重建
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: C4G proposes a feed-forward 4D reconstruction framework using timestamp-conditioned Gaussian query tokens to model global motion coherently without per-scene optimization.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 从单目视频动态场景重建中，现有前馈方法逐帧预测3D高斯导致重复和视角偏差，难以学习运动。本文提出C4G，基于一组紧凑的、带时间戳条件的可学习高斯查询令牌。每个令牌从完整时间上下文中聚合对应特征，解码出3D高斯，其位置由目标时间戳调制，从而实现全局连贯的运动建模，无需每场景优化。此外引入视频扩散模型渲染精细细节。实验表明，C4G在动态场景重建上优于逐帧方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 从单目视频动态场景重建中，现有前馈方法逐帧预测3D高斯导致重复和视角偏差，难以学习运动。本文提出C4G，基于一组紧凑的、带时间戳条件的可学习高斯查询令牌。每个令牌从完整时间上下文中聚合对应特征，解码出3D高斯，其位置由目标时间戳调制，从而实现全局连贯的运动建模，无需每场景优化。此外引入视频扩散模型渲染精细细节。实验表明，C4G在动态场景重建上优于逐帧方法。

quick_skim.title: DGSG-Mind: Dynamic 3D Gaussian Scene Graphs for Long-Term Scene Understanding and Grounding
quick_skim.abstract: Integrating open-vocabulary semantic information into dynamic 3D scene representations is essential for long-term embodied scene understanding. However, existing methods often suffer from fragile instance association due to incomplete cross-view cues, while their limited ability to handle object-level topological changes restricts long-term robotic task execution. Moreover, current 3D scene understanding methods either rely on simple feature matching without explicit spatial reasoning or assume offline ground-truth 3D geometry. To address these challenges, we present DGSG-Mind, a hybrid instance-aware 3D Gaussian dynamic scene graph system with an embodied reasoning agent. Our system couples a probabilistic voxel grid with explicit 3D Gaussians to enable robust cross-modal instance fusion and incremental semantic mapping. It handles dynamic changes through Gaussian-based visual relocalization and localized masked refinement guided by geometric-semantic consistency. Built on the instance Gaussian map, DGSG-Mind further constructs a hierarchical scene graph and develops the 3D Gaussian Mind, which integrates structural relations, spatial-semantic information, and visually annotated RoI Gaussian renderings for multimodal reasoning. Extensive experiments show that DGSG-Mind achieves the best zero-shot 3DVG performance among methods operating on self-reconstructed maps, while also delivering strong performance in 3D open-vocabulary semantic segmentation and scene reconstruction. We further deploy DGSG-Mind on real-world robots to demonstrate its target-oriented reasoning and dynamic update capabilities. The project page of DGSG-Mind is available at https://icr-lab.github.io/DGSG-Mind
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: instance-aware 3D Gaussian scene graphs for part-level understanding
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 实例感知的3D高斯场景图用于部件级理解
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 实例感知的3D高斯场景图用于部件级理解
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 实例感知的3D高斯场景图用于部件级理解
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: DGSG-Mind builds dynamic 3D Gaussian scene graphs with instance-aware representation for long-term scene understanding and semantic grounding.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 长期具身场景理解需要将开放词汇语义融入动态3D表示。现有方法存在实例关联脆弱、无法处理物体拓扑变化等问题。本文提出DGSG-Mind，一种混合实例感知的3D高斯动态场景图系统，结合概率体素网格与显式实例表示，并配有具身推理智能体。该系统能随时间维护物体实例的身份和拓扑关系，支持语义定位和交互。在长期场景理解任务中展示了鲁棒的实例分割和关联能力。虽不专注部件分割，但其实例感知能力与部件分割相关。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 长期具身场景理解需要将开放词汇语义融入动态3D表示。现有方法存在实例关联脆弱、无法处理物体拓扑变化等问题。本文提出DGSG-Mind，一种混合实例感知的3D高斯动态场景图系统，结合概率体素网格与显式实例表示，并配有具身推理智能体。该系统能随时间维护物体实例的身份和拓扑关系，支持语义定位和交互。在长期场景理解任务中展示了鲁棒的实例分割和关联能力。虽不专注部件分割，但其实例感知能力与部件分割相关。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 部件分割, especially work that connects or combines: 3D shape part segmentation techniques; semantic labeling of object components and sub-parts; Hierarchical part segmentation for complex objects; Object instance segmentation algorithms; Point cloud part-level segmentation methods; datasets for training part segmentation models; Comparison of instance segmentation frameworks; Evaluation metrics for part level segmentation.

quick_skim.title: Feature-Optimized Vision for Adaptive 3D Scene Reconstruction
quick_skim.abstract: Three-dimensional scene reconstruction depends on local image evidence that is both visually discriminative and geometrically useful. Fixed feature thresholds and uniform feature budgets are easy to deploy, but they can waste computation on repeated texture, low-parallax regions, or unstable points. This paper proposes an adaptive feature-optimized vision front end for 3D reconstruction. The method scores candidate features by texture, repeatability, distinctiveness, expected triangulation angle, and spatial coverage, then allocates a per-view feature budget to maximize useful tracks under a fixed reconstruction pipeline. A small synthetic multi-view prototype evaluates four selection policies across corridor, facade, object-table, and cluttered scenes. Compared with random, texture-only, and uniform-grid baselines, the adaptive policy obtains the best quality-aware completeness and the lowest aggregate reconstruction RMSE while preserving broad image coverage. The result is not a replacement for modern learned matching or neural reconstruction systems; it is a modular front-end policy that can make classical and learned 3D pipelines more deliberate about which visual evidence they spend compute on.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: adaptive feature optimization for efficient 3D reconstruction
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于高效3D重建的自适应特征优化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于高效3D重建的自适应特征优化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于高效3D重建的自适应特征优化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This work proposes an adaptive feature-optimized front end for 3D reconstruction that scores features by multiple criteria and allocates per-view budgets to maximize reconstruction utility.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出了一种自适应特征优化前端，用于3D场景重建。该方法通过纹理、可重复性、独特性、三角化角度和空间覆盖等多个准则对候选特征评分，并为每视图特征预算分配以最大化有用轨迹。在多种场景（走廊、立面、物体桌面等）上的评估表明，该策略能在固定重建管道下提升重建质量与效率，为大规模3D重建提供了实用的特征管理方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应特征优化前端，用于3D场景重建。该方法通过纹理、可重复性、独特性、三角化角度和空间覆盖等多个准则对候选特征评分，并为每视图特征预算分配以最大化有用轨迹。在多种场景（走廊、立面、物体桌面等）上的评估表明，该策略能在固定重建管道下提升重建质量与效率，为大规模3D重建提供了实用的特征管理方案。
